### Q1951 (real_patient_scenarios)

**原始问题:** I have a 52-year-old female with a Stage IIIB cervical cancer (FIGO 2018). MRI shows a 7 cm cervical tumor with bilateral parametrial extension reaching the pelvic sidewall on the left. She has a 20-year history of type 2 diabetes (HbA1c 8.5%), hypertension requiring 3 medications (BP 150/92), and chronic kidney disease stage 3b (GFR 42). She has never been pregnant. She completed 45 Gy pelvic EBRT with weekly cisplatin (dose-reduced due to CKD). She is now being evaluated for brachytherapy. MRI shows partial response with residual 4 cm central tumor. ## 五、修复建议

### 5.1 验证机制优化
- 对 medical_knowledge 类别改用 OR 验证或降低 AND 阈值
- 增加同义词匹配
- 移除过于具体的关键词

### 5.2 BrachyBot 系统改进
- 检查短响应案例，确保回复完整
- 监控幻觉输出
- 优化长响应截断

### 5.3 下一步行动
1. 优化关键词验证机制
2. 修复发现的系统问题
3. 回归测试验证
4. 扩展测试覆盖
